heroHeadline:
US & Israel Strike Iran,
Killing Supreme Leader Khamenei
heroSubtitle: Operation Epic Fury launched February 28 in the largest US military action in the Middle East since the 2003 Iraq invasion. The conflict has expanded to Lebanon, Iraq, and Gulf states with Iranian retaliatory strikes reaching Dubai, Doha, Abu Dhabi, and Bahrain. Mojtaba Khamenei named Iran's new Supreme Leader. Brent crude surges above $112/bbl.
footerNote: Data compiled from 80+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 10, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
